stories.title: Postcards from the World Cup: Seeing the U.S., Can...
stories.summary: The 2026 World Cup has been unique for being co-hosted by three countries, the U.S., Canada and Mexico. What has the tournament been like in each nation? Mark Ogden went to find out.

stories.title: Pride, joy and anxiety: What watching a family mem...
stories.summary: It's incredible for families who have seen loved ones playing on the biggest stage there is at a World Cup.

stories.title: France's Mbappé calls Paraguay tactics 'ugly'
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé warned future World Cup opponents that France are ready to "play ugly" and get their "hands dirty" after brushing off Paraguay's provocations in a heated 1-0 round-of-16 victory,

stories.title: Ohtani, Freeman lead Dodgers' 4 All-Star starters
stories.summary: Shohei Ohtani will be joined by three Los Angeles teammates in the NL's starting lineup, while the Dodgers, Braves and Phillies will each send five players to the July 14 All-Star Game.

stories.title: 'Emotional' Contreras apologizes for on-field flap...
stories.summary: Red Sox first baseman Willson Contreras offered an emotional apology for his involvement in a pair of bench-clearing incidents against the Yankees and Nationals this past week.
